evals.prompt: Create a new plugin called zoto-analytics with 1 agent, 2 skills, 1 command.
assertions: The plugin directory plugins/zoto-analytics/ is created with required structure
plugin.json manifest has name, displayName, version, description, author, license
Each skill has SKILL.md with correct frontmatter and evals/evals.json

evals.prompt: Validate an existing plugin that has a skill missing evals/evals.json.
assertions: The validation identifies the missing evals.json
The error message names the specific skill lacking eval coverage
